seo.title: SEO for Single-Page Apps implementation checklist
seo.description: A practical checklist for shipping SEO for Single-Page Apps projects safely.

content.intro: This checklist provides a technical framework for ensuring Single-Page Applications (SPAs) are discoverable, indexable, and optimized for search engine crawlers before deployment to production.

items.title: Verify Server-Side Rendering (SSR) or Static Site Generation (SSG)
items.description: Disable JavaScript in the browser and reload the page to ensure all primary content is visible in the initial HTML source.

items.title: Validate Googlebot Rendering via Search Console
items.description: Use the URL Inspection Tool in Google Search Console to confirm the 'Live Test' screenshot matches the intended visual layout and content.

items.title: Implement Prerendering for Bots
items.description: If using pure CSR, configure a middleware like Prerender.io or Rendertron to serve static HTML snapshots specifically to crawler User-Agents.

items.title: Synchronize Hydration State
items.description: Ensure the client-side hydration process does not cause a layout shift or replace SEO-critical text content after the initial paint.

items.title: Check Data Fetching Timeouts
items.description: Verify that API calls required for content rendering resolve within 5 seconds to prevent crawlers from indexing empty templates.

items.title: Unique Title Tags per Route
items.description: Ensure every route updates the <title> tag dynamically using React Helmet, vue-meta, or equivalent framework-specific head managers.

items.title: Dynamic Meta Descriptions
items.description: Verify that each page has a unique <meta name="description"> that accurately reflects the specific content of that route.

items.title: Self-Referencing Canonical Tags
items.description: Inject a <link rel="canonical"> tag on every page to prevent duplicate content issues caused by URL parameters or trailing slashes.

items.title: Open Graph and Twitter Card Integration
items.description: Validate that social meta tags update dynamically to ensure correct link previews when sharing specific SPA routes.

items.title: Language Attribute Declaration
items.description: Ensure the <html lang=""> attribute is updated if the SPA supports multiple locales or dynamic content switching.

items.title: Replace Hash-based Routing
items.description: Use the HTML5 History API (pushState) instead of hash (#) routing to ensure URLs are crawlable by all search engines.

items.title: Use Standard Anchor Tags
items.description: Ensure all internal navigation uses <a href="/path"> instead of button elements with onClick handlers to allow crawler discovery.

items.title: Trailing Slash Consistency
items.description: Configure the router and server to enforce a single pattern (either with or without trailing slashes) to avoid split link equity.

items.title: Absolute URL Implementation
items.description: Use absolute URLs for all internal links and metadata references to prevent resolution errors during crawler discovery.

items.title: Breadcrumb Schema Injection
items.description: Inject JSON-LD structured data for breadcrumbs on every sub-page to improve SERP appearance and internal linking structure.

items.title: Optimize Largest Contentful Paint (LCP)
items.description: Preload critical hero images and prioritize the rendering of above-the-fold content to keep LCP under 2.5 seconds.

items.title: Minimize Cumulative Layout Shift (CLS)
items.description: Set explicit dimensions for images and reserve space for dynamic components (like ads or banners) using skeleton screens.

items.title: Route-based Code Splitting
items.description: Implement lazy loading for routes to ensure the initial JavaScript bundle size is minimized for faster First Contentful Paint (FCP).

items.title: Compress and Optimize Assets
items.description: Serve images in modern formats (WebP/Avif) and ensure all JS/CSS assets are Gzipped or Brotli compressed.

items.title: Font Loading Strategy
items.description: Use font-display: swap in CSS to prevent layout shifts and ensure text remains visible during web font loading.

items.title: Configure 404 HTTP Status Codes
items.description: Ensure the server returns a true 404 status code for non-existent routes rather than a 200 OK with a 'Not Found' UI.

items.title: Dynamic XML Sitemap Generation
items.description: Automate the generation of a sitemap.xml file that includes all dynamic routes and excludes utility or private pages.

items.title: Robots.txt Configuration
items.description: Verify that robots.txt does not block the JavaScript or CSS assets required by crawlers to render the page layout.

items.title: Server-Side Redirects (301/302)
items.description: Handle permanent URL changes at the server level (Nginx/Vercel/Netlify) rather than using client-side window.location changes.

items.title: Image Alt Text Audit
items.description: Verify that all images rendered via JavaScript include descriptive alt attributes for accessibility and image search indexing.
